# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: sample-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: targetApp # replace with your application label
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["spiffe://cluster.local/ns/default/sa/srcserviceaccount"] # replace with service account name or path
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET","POST"]
        paths: ["/path1", "/path2"]  # replace with your HTTP method and path
